check.name: UnusedPrivateField
check.description: Check that a private field is declared, but never used. Fields with any other visibility (package-private, protected, or public), including those declared in an implicitly declared class (compact source file), are not checked.

property.name: ignoreAnnotationCanonicalNames
property.description: Specify annotations canonical names which ignore variables in consideration.

property.name: ignoredFieldNames
property.description: Specify field names to ignore, even if they otherwise satisfy this check's detection of an unused private field. Note this replaces the default value entirely — to keep serialVersionUID ignored alongside your own names, include it explicitly.
